Book Table
WELCOME TO MAISON ÉLAN

An Elegant European
Dining Experience

Artisan desserts, handcrafted cuisine, and moments created slowly.

Explore Menu Reserve Your Table
Scroll to Begin
OUR PHILOSOPHY

Where Craftsmanship Meets Slow Living

"Maison Élan represents a refined European dining experience, curated to merge timeless French culinary discipline with the warm heart of Hyderabadi hospitality."

Nestled in the vibrant heart of Jubilee Hills, Maison Élan is a sanctuary for those who appreciate the fine art of slow living. Our patisserie showcases delicate creations prepared daily by master chefs, combining butter flown in from Normandy with local premium organic spices.

Every cup of signature hot chocolate, every delicate fold of our pastries, and every plate of fresh pasta in our dinner salon is crafted with dedication.

Read Our Complete Journey →
CURATED JOURNEYS

The Signature Experiences

Three distinct expressions of our craft, designed to engage all your senses.

Artisan Patisserie

Delicate creations, double-baked croissants, and gold-accented tarts made with classic French precision.

French Craft

European Cuisine

Handcrafted modern plates, stone-baked flatbreads, and aromatic pastas infused with premium seasonal ingredients.

Modern Bistro

Signature Brews

Pour-overs, delicate organic teas, and our legendary slow-melted hot chocolate crafted with 70% dark Belgian cocoa.

Artisanal Bar
CULINARY ARTISTRY

Featured Highlights

A sneak preview of our signature specialties, prepared with the finest ingredients.

Signature

Almond Croissant

₹320

Twice-baked flaky butter croissant filled with rich almond frangipane, topped with toasted sliced almonds and vanilla icing.

Eggless Available
Chef's Special

Pistachio Rose Tart

₹450

Delicate crisp pastry base lined with sweet pistachio ganache, layered with organic rosewater cream, finished with crushed premium pistachios.

Eggless
New

Truffle Cacio e Pepe

₹650

Handcrafted fresh tonnarelli pasta, tossed in an emulsion of aged Pecorino Romano cheese, fresh crushed black pepper, and premium black truffle paste.

Vegetarian
Legendary

Signature Hot Chocolate

₹360

Pure melted 70% dark Belgian chocolate mixed with fresh organic milk, simmered slowly and served with a house-made gourmet marshmallow.

House Blend
View Complete Catalog
GUEST VOICES

The Élan Experience

Read what connoisseurs and guests say about their time in our salon.

★★★★★
June 2026

"Maison Élan is an absolute masterpiece. The pistachio rose tart was incredibly delicate, tasting exactly like the fine patisseries on Saint-Germain-des-Prés. But what really blew me away was the atmosphere—generous spacing, warm candlelit arches, and staff who treat hospitality as a fine art."

AA

Ananya Amin

Food Journalist & Curator

★★★★★
July 2026

"From the moment you step through the grand wooden door, you are transported. It feels like a boutique luxury hotel lobby in Paris. The signature hot chocolate is rich, thick, and perfectly tempered. We spent three hours talking over dessert, and never once felt rushed."

RK

Rohan Kulkarni

Architect

★★★★★
May 2026

"The saffron cardamom latte is a genius nod to local heritage, blending seamlessly with their classic French menu. The food is spectacular, but the design, lighting, and serene ambient soundtrack make it a world-class experience. Truly premium."

SD

Sarah D'Souza

Premium Lifestyle Blogger

★★★★★
June 2026

"Maison Élan is an absolute masterpiece. The pistachio rose tart was incredibly delicate, tasting exactly like the fine patisseries on Saint-Germain-des-Prés. But what really blew me away was the atmosphere—generous spacing, warm candlelit arches, and staff who treat hospitality as a fine art."

AA

Ananya Amin

Food Journalist & Curator

★★★★★
July 2026

"From the moment you step through the grand wooden door, you are transported. It feels like a boutique luxury hotel lobby in Paris. The signature hot chocolate is rich, thick, and perfectly tempered. We spent three hours talking over dessert, and never once felt rushed."

RK

Rohan Kulkarni

Architect

★★★★★
May 2026

"The saffron cardamom latte is a genius nod to local heritage, blending seamlessly with their classic French menu. The food is spectacular, but the design, lighting, and serene ambient soundtrack make it a world-class experience. Truly premium."
